ORDER FOR DISBURSEMENT OF SURPLUS TO SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING AND TO TRUSTORS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CLAIMANT SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO NOTICE OF STATEMENT OF CLAIM TO SURPLUS FUNDS BY SAN FRANCISCO MAYORS OFFICE OF HOUSING PURSUANT TO ITS INTEREST UNDER CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE SEC. 2924KA3 IS GRANTED. THE SURPLUS FUNDS FROM JULY 31, 2014 TRUSTEE'S SALE OF 501 BEALE STREE, UNIT 14, IN THE AMOUNT OF FIFTY THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED AND SIX DOLLAR AND TWENTY-NINE CENTS ($50,806.29), MAY BE DISBURSED TO SAN FRANCISCO, AND THAT ONETHOUSANT FIVE HUNDRES DOLLARS AND ZERO CENTS ($1,500.00) OF THE SURPLUS FUNDS MAY BE DISBURSED TO TRUSTORS AS PROVIDED IN THE STIPULATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By San Francisco Mayors Office Of Housing Pursuant To Its Interest Under California Civil Code Sec. 2924ka3
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robb W. Kapla, Esq., (415)554-4667 Deputy City Attorney City and Counrty of San Francisco for Respondents/Claimants San Francisco Mayor's Office of Housing and City and Counrty of San Francisco

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments makes the following ruling: CLAIMANT SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Notice Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By San Francisco Mayors Office Of Housing Pursuant To Its Interest Under California Civil Code Sec. 2924ka3 is Granted. The surplus funds from July 31, 2014 trustee's sale of 501 Beale Stree, Unit 14, in the amount of Fifty Thousand Eight Hundred and Six dollar and Twenty-nine cents ($50,806.29), may be disbursed to San Francisco, and that OneThousant Five Hundres dollars and Zero cents ($1,500.00) of the surplus funds may be disbursed to Trustors as provided in the stipulation. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deposit Susplus Funds
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq. (310-858-9771) specially appearing for Petitioner/Moving party CLEAR RECON CORP.
No other Appearance.

Petioner submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP.'s Motion For Order To Deposit Susplus Funds is GRANTED. Petitioner shall deposit $52,306.29 forthwith. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By San Francisco Mayors Office Of Housing Pursuant To Its Interest Under California Civil Code Sec. 2924ka3
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Nov-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq. (310-858-9771) specially appearing for Petitioner CLEAR RECON CORP.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING and CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By San Francisco Mayors Office Of Housing Pursuant To Its Interest Under California Civil Code Sec. 2924ka3 is Continued to November 13, 2015. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
